channel.title: Qemu on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump
channel.description: Recent content in Qemu on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump

item.title: Windows 11 IoT in QEMU
item.description: Sometimes you absolutely need Windows to run a piece of software. This page explains how to install and run Windows 11 IoT LTSC into QEMU in less than 30 minutes.
